behaviors.reasoning: Splitting a command string on delimiters/newlines is pure parsing logic; lower than Unit is not applicable.
Correct trigger detection depends on parser output wired into trigger classification, not just one helper function.
Avoiding false positives requires parser + classifier interaction across multiple command forms.
Persisting real PR identifiers depends on real command output/URL reconstruction and filesystem state beyond in-process mocks.
End-to-end gate persistence must be validated across hook boundaries and state files used by separate processes.
